query:
INSERT INTO bupa_prerequisites (service_name, icd_codes, requirements) VALUES
('MRI', 'M23, M51, M75, M17, R51, R22, G43, C71, M54', '1- Comprehensive Medical History and physical examination findings, highlighting the indication for the MRI scan and relevant past medical and surgical history.
2- Relevant imaging reports (e.g. X-ray or ultrasound).
3- Lab results if applicable to the indication.'),
('CT', 'R55, R51, I61.9, I63.9, C71.9, R10, K35', '1- Comprehensive Medical History and physical examination findings, highlighting the indication for the CT scan and relevant past medical and surgical history.
2- Relevant imaging reports (e.g. X-ray or ultrasound).
3- Lab results if applicable to the indication.'),
('Ultrasound', 'R10, R11, R12, R13, R14, R15, R16, R17, R18, R19', '1- Clinical indication and examination findings.
2- Previous imaging reports if available.
3- Lab results if applicable.'),
('Physical Therapy', 'M54, M51, M75, M23, M17, I69, G81', '1- Comprehensive Medical History and physical examination findings, highlighting the indication for physical therapy and relevant past medical and surgical history.
2- Imaging reports (e.g. X-ray, MRI, CT, or ultrasound).
3- A detailed proposed treatment plan (the physical therapy modalities will be followed, the number of required sessions and the Goals of treatment) along with follow-up assessment report.'),
('Medical Equipment - Glucometer', 'E11, E10', 'RBS or FBS or HbA1C or Medication history.'),
('Medical Equipment - BP Machine', 'I10, I11', '3 BP readings at different occasions.'),
('Medical Equipment - Nebulizer', 'J45, J40', 'Clinical findings and diagnosis.'),
('Medical Equipment - Hearing Aid', 'H90, H91', 'Audiometry and Tympanometry if applicable.'),
('Medical Equipment - CPAP for OSA', 'G47.33, G47.20', 'Sleep Study Report.'),
('Medical Equipment - Insulin Pump', 'E10, E11', 'A- Documented report demonstrating treatment attempts with multiple daily injections for at least 6 months, including drug prescriptions.
B- Documented blood glucose readings for the last two months.
C- Documented medical visit reports highlighting attempts to adjust insulin administration and self-management during the visits.
D- A documented report confirming that the patient has completed a diabetes education training program satisfactorily, including self-care processes and follow-up procedures.
E- A minimum of two HbA1c lab results, each taken recently (within the last 3 months) and spaced at least 3 months apart.');
